# Supporting OPCUA Commander

OPCUA Commander is an open-source initiative of **[Sterfive](https://www.sterfive.com)**. We are an independent company (not affiliated with any industrial or software vendors) and a corporate member of the OPC Foundation.

To maintain high-quality software, continuous integration, and keep up-to-date with OPC UA standards, we need the support of our users.

---

## 🔐 Professional & Commercial Support

If you are using OPCUA Commander or Node-OPCUA in a corporate or commercial product, we strongly recommend subscribing to the **[Node-OPCUA Membership Program](https://support.sterfive.com)**.

### What membership ensures:
* 🚀 **Fast Reply and Resolution:** Guaranteed priority response times from the core creators.
* 🔐 **Confidentiality & Privacy:** Private discussions and ticket handling for your proprietary applications.
* 🔍 **Dedicated Investigation:** Core maintainers will deeply inspect and debug issues specific to your system.
* 🐛 **Prompt Bug Fixes:** Rapid development and release of patches for blocking bugs.
* 🛡️ **Early CVE & Security Alerts:** Advanced access to security vulnerability disclosures (CVEs) and pre-remediation patches before public announcement.
* 📖 **Free Book Access:** Complimentary access to the most up-to-date online edition of the **[Node-OPCUA by Example](https://leanpub.com/node-opcuabyexample-edition2024)** book.

> 📧 **Contact Sterfive Directly:** For custom development, enterprise training, or custom licensing, reach us at [contact@sterfive.com](mailto:contact@sterfive.com).

---

## ❤️ Sponsoring & Grants

Once you have evaluated OPCUA Commander and proven it useful to your business, please consider backing or sponsoring us to ensure the long-term maintenance of this project.

### Sponsor Channels:
* **GitHub Sponsors:** [github.com/sponsors/node-opcua](https://github.com/sponsors/node-opcua)
* **Direct Grant:** Contact us directly at [contact@sterfive.com](mailto:contact@sterfive.com)

---

## 👥 Community Support

If you are a hobbyist or looking for general guidance, please utilize our community-focused channels:

* 💬 **GitHub Discussions:** Ask questions, share ideas, and interact with other developers directly on our **[GitHub Discussions Board](https://github.com/node-opcua/node-opcua/discussions)**.
* 📖 **Reference Book:** Read the complete guide, **[Node-OPCUA by Example](https://leanpub.com/node-opcuabyexample-edition2024)**.
